sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: VSEE - VSee Health, Inc. Latest Stock News & Market Updates
feed.summary: This page provides the latest news and updates for VSee Health, Inc. (NASDAQ: VSEE), a telehealth technology company. It focuses on the company's developments in AI-powered virtual care, digital health infrastructure, and capital markets. The news includes strategic partnerships, product launches, financial disclosures, and compliance updates, offering insights into VSee Health's evolving business and financial health.

feed.title: TD Cowen Adjusts Price Target on Generac Holdings to $255 From $220, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: TD Cowen has increased its price target for Generac Holdings to $255 from $220, while reiterating its Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst a flurry of analyst activity surrounding Generac Holdings, following recent financial reports and market performance. Other analysts have also revised their price targets and ratings for the company, reflecting varied outlooks on its future.

feed.title: CarMax Appoints Keith Barr as New President and CEO
feed.summary: CarMax has appointed Keith Barr, former CEO of InterContinental Hotels Group, as its new President and CEO, effective March 16, 2026. This move signals CarMax's strategy to bolster its omni-channel growth and leverage technology for efficiency in the competitive used-vehicle market. Barr's extensive experience in digital transformation and customer experience is expected to deepen customer engagement and uphold CarMax's market position.

feed.title: GlobalFoundries price target raised to $50 from $40 at Wedbush
feed.summary: Wedbush has increased its price target for GlobalFoundries Inc. (NASDAQ:GFS) to $50 from $40, maintaining a Neutral rating on the stock. This adjustment is due to improving conditions in the mature foundry market and growth opportunities in AI-related sectors, including power and networking. GlobalFoundries recently exceeded market expectations in its Q4 2025 earnings report, and Baird also raised its price target to $60, citing strong revenue drivers such as silicon photonics and automotive segment momentum.

feed.title: PNC Rose 8% in the Last 30 Days. Here’s Where the Stock Could Go in 2026
feed.summary: PNC Financial Services Group (PNC) recently saw an 8% increase in its stock price, reaching approximately $235 per share, driven by strong 2026 earnings guidance and positive management commentary. The company anticipates accelerated net interest income growth and an increase in net interest margin above 3% by late 2026. A valuation model suggests PNC is undervalued, with a target price of $292, indicating potential upside due to growth in net interest income, diversified fee expansion, and operational discipline.

feed.title: Fastenal Stock Rose 25% Last Year. Here’s Where Shares Could Go in 2026
feed.summary: Fastenal (FAST) shares advanced 25% last year, and the company is implementing strategic shifts including rebranding its RFK Racing partnership and a planned CEO transition in July 2026. Despite a projection of Fastenal's stock reaching $58 by 2028 with an 8% revenue CAGR and 21% operating margin, TIKR's model suggests a "Sell" recommendation, forecasting a 7.6% annualized return which falls below a typical 10% equity hurdle rate, indicating insufficient compensation for industrial cyclicality and execution risks. The analysis is based on assumptions of 8% revenue growth, 20.8% operating margins, and a 36.1x exit P/E multiple.

feed.title: Iron Mountain Q4 earnings beat, with growth businesses setting stage for strong 2026 (IRM:NYSE)
feed.summary: Iron Mountain (IRM) reported strong Q4 results, surpassing analyst expectations for revenue, adjusted FFO per share, and adjusted EBITDA. The company projects continued double-digit growth through 2026, driven significantly by its data center, digital, and asset lifecycle management businesses, which saw over 40% year-over-year growth. This performance positions Iron Mountain for a strong financial future, complementing its solid traditional storage business.

feed.title: Prospera Financial Services Inc Sells 22,638 Shares of Cintas Corporation $CTAS
feed.summary: Prospera Financial Services Inc reduced its stake in Cintas Corporation (NASDAQ:CTAS) by 58.0% in the third quarter, selling 22,638 shares and holding 16,364 shares valued at $3,359,000. Cintas last reported earnings of $1.21 per share, beating analyst estimates, and announced a quarterly dividend of $0.45 per share. The company also initiated a $1.00 billion share buyback plan.

feed.title: West Pharmaceutical Q4 EPS Beats Estimates; Guides 2026 Sales Growth of 5% to 7%
feed.summary: West Pharmaceutical Services (NYSE: WST) reported strong Q4 2025 financial results, exceeding analyst expectations with adjusted diluted EPS up 12.1% and net sales growing 7.5%. The company's Proprietary Products segment, particularly High-Value Product components and Biologics, drove this growth. West Pharmaceutical also issued an optimistic 2026 outlook, forecasting organic revenue growth of 5% to 7% and adjusted diluted EPS between $7.85 and $8.20, despite the planned divestiture of its SmartDose 3.5mL system.

feed.title: FMC Weighs Full Sale As Debt Pressures And Patent Risks Mount
feed.summary: FMC (NYSE:FMC) is considering a full company sale and has engaged advisors to explore broad options for its future, alongside ongoing plans to sell its Indian business and reduce debt. This strategic review is a response to recent credit rating downgrades and the impact of patent expirations. The move signals a potential major shift for the company, as it faces financial challenges including a 2025 net loss and high leverage, requiring careful attention from investors regarding ownership structure and future cash flows.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (CBRE) CBRE Group, Inc. Posts Q4 Core EPS $2.73 per Share, vs. FactSet Est of $2.68
feed.summary: CBRE Group, Inc. announced its Q4 Core EPS at $2.73 per share, surpassing FactSet's estimate of $2.68. The company also reported Q4 revenue of $11.63 billion, slightly below FactSet's estimate of $11.69 billion. Furthermore, CBRE Group expects its 2026 Core EPS to range between $7.30 and $7.60, compared to FactSet's estimate of $7.39.

feed.title: BorgWarner (BWA) Climbs to All-Time High as Firm Clinches Multiple Deals
feed.summary: BorgWarner (BWA) reached a new all-time high after securing several new deals, including a major master supply agreement with TurboCell for turbine generator systems projected to generate $300 million in its first year. The company also announced five other supply deals with various OEMs for components like turbochargers, integrated drive modules, battery management systems, and electric cross differentials. Despite an 18% decline in net income last year, net sales increased by 1.4%, and the fourth quarter saw a significant narrowing of net loss and a 5% jump in net sales.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (KIM) Kimco Realty Posts Q4 Revenue $542.5M, vs. FactSet Est of $537.2M
feed.summary: Kimco Realty (KIM) reported its Q4 revenue at $542.5 million, surpassing FactSet's estimate of $537.2 million. The company also announced a Q4 FFO of $0.44 per share, which met FactSet's expectation. Additionally, Kimco Realty expects its full-year 2026 FFO to be in the range of $1.80 to $1.84, aligning with FactSet's estimate of $1.80.

feed.title: BMO Capital Maintains an Outperform Rating on Intuit Inc. (INTU)
feed.summary: BMO Capital has maintained an Outperform rating on Intuit Inc. (INTU) despite lowering its price target from $810 to $624. Similarly, TD Cowen also adjusted its price target to $658 from $802 while keeping a Buy rating, noting expectations for a strong performance against low expectations. Intuit recently announced a partnership with Affirm to integrate pay-over-time solutions into QuickBooks Payments, aiming to enhance financial management capabilities for small and mid-market businesses.

feed.title: Brunswick extends 14-year dividend hike streak, pays $0.44 a share
feed.summary: Brunswick Corporation (NYSE: BC) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.44 per share, payable on March 13, 2026, to shareholders of record on February 23, 2026. This marks the 14th consecutive year of dividend increases, reflecting the company's commitment to shareholder value and confidence in its long-term strategy. CEO Dave Foulkes highlighted the company's focus on innovation across its brands and sustained growth.

feed.title: SRH Total Return Fund, Inc. Declares Quarterly Distribution
feed.summary: SRH Total Return Fund, Inc. (NYSE:STEW) announced a quarterly distribution of $0.20 per share payable in April 2026, as part of its managed distribution program. This program aims to provide a regular quarterly distribution to stockholders, independent of income earned or capital gains realized. As of February 9, 2026, the annualized distribution represents approximately 4.38% of the Fund's market price and 3.43% of its net asset value.

feed.title: Tripadvisor, Inc. Earnings Press Release Available on Company's Investor Relations Site
feed.summary: Tripadvisor, Inc. has released its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 earnings press release, now available on its investor relations website, ir.tripadvisor.com, and the SEC website. The company is set to host a conference call today, February 12, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET to discuss these results, with a live webcast and replay accessible online. Tripadvisor aims to be a trusted source for travel and experiences, connecting a global audience with partners through various brands like Viator and TheFork.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Industrial Goods Companies: Boeing (BA), Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies (WAB) and Insperity (NSP)
feed.summary: This article highlights bullish analyst sentiments on three industrial goods companies: Boeing (BA), Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies (WAB), and Insperity (NSP). UBS maintained a Buy rating on Boeing with a $285 price target, while Bank of America Securities reiterated a Buy on Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies with a $278 target. Roth MKM also reaffirmed a Buy rating on Insperity, setting a price target of $56.

feed.title: TD Cowen Maintains Buy on KO The Coca-Cola Company Feb 11 2026
feed.summary: TD Cowen has reaffirmed its "Buy" rating for The Coca-Cola Company (KO) and increased its price target to $85, signaling continued confidence in the company's financial outlook and brand strength. This action reflects the firm's belief in Coca-Cola's revenue mix and margin outlook, despite a modest market response of a 1.37% intraday gain. Meyka AI also rates KO with a B+ grade, suggesting a positive outlook based on various financial metrics and market comparisons.

feed.title: Howmet Aerospace Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results
feed.summary: Howmet Aerospace has announced its fourth quarter and full year 2025 financial results, showcasing record revenue, profit, and cash from operations, primarily driven by strong performance in the commercial aerospace, defense aerospace, and gas turbines markets. The company reported significant year-over-year growth in revenue and net income for both periods, along with strategic initiatives including acquisitions and debt management. Looking ahead to 2026, Howmet Aerospace provided optimistic guidance with projected revenue growth and increased adjusted EBITDA and earnings per share.

feed.title: SRH Total Return Fund, Inc. Declares Quarterly Distribution
feed.summary: SRH Total Return Fund, Inc. (NYSE: STEW) has announced a quarterly distribution of $0.20 per share, payable in April 2026, as part of its managed distribution program. This program aims to provide regular distributions of approximately $0.80 per year. The distribution, as of February 9, 2026, represents 4.38% of the Fund's market price and 3.43% of its NAV on an annualized basis.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Maintained Underweight on MGM Resorts International (MGM) Feb 11, 2026
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley maintained an "Underweight" rating on MGM Resorts International (MGM) on February 11, 2026, while slightly raising its price target from $33 to $34. This indicates a cautious stance with a modest improvement in outlook, suggesting limited near-term upside despite recent disclosures about Las Vegas growth and Macau market share. Meyka AI independently rates MGM with a "B" grade based on various financial and market performance metrics.

feed.title: Ameren grid upgrades averted 160,000 storm outages, lured $1.5B to Missouri
feed.summary: Ameren Missouri's updated Smart Energy Plan, filed on February 12, 2026, details a five-year strategy to enhance grid reliability and resilience. In 2025 alone, smart upgrades prevented 160,000 customer outages during major storms. The plan has also attracted over $1.5 billion in business investment and created 2,200 jobs in Missouri.

feed.title: Closed-end fund at 21.71% discount pays $0.20 per share in April
feed.summary: SRH Total Return Fund (NYSE: STEW) has declared a quarterly cash distribution of $0.20 per share, payable on April 30, 2026. This distribution is part of the Fund's managed distribution program, aiming for approximately $0.80 per year. As of February 9, 2026, the Fund's shares traded at an 21.71% discount to its NAV, with an annualized distribution yield of 4.38% on market price and 3.43% on NAV.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider L3Harris Technologies (LHX) After A 73% One Year Surge?
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies (LHX) has seen a 73% surge over the past year, leading investors to question its current valuation. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock might be undervalued by 10.4% at around $340 per share, estimating an intrinsic value of $379.60. However, its P/E ratio of 39.63x is above Simply Wall St's Fair Ratio of 33.43x, indicating it could be overvalued by this metric.

feed.title: HSBC Adjusts Price Target on Hilton Worldwide to $350 From $319, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: HSBC has increased its price target for Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. to $350 from $319, while reaffirming its Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst a series of analyst updates for Hilton, with several firms modifying their price targets and ratings on the same day. Other notable adjustments include JPMorgan to $350, Wells Fargo to $373, and Goldman Sachs to $356, mostly maintaining positive outlooks.

feed.title: Oracle named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™for Customer Data Platforms
feed.summary: Oracle has been recognized as a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Customer Data Platforms for its Oracle Unity Data Platform. The company attributes this recognition to Unity's ability to unify front- and back-office data across various business functions—ERP, sales, service, and marketing—to power AI-driven customer experiences and facilitate enterprise-wide orchestration. Oracle emphasizes that this leadership position validates their focus on providing a comprehensive data platform that supports not just marketing activation but also cross-functional teams and strategic decision-making.

feed.title: Applied Optoelectronics (NASDAQ:AAOI) CFO Sells $587,573.25 in Stock
feed.summary: Applied Optoelectronics (NASDAQ:AAOI) CFO Stefan Murry sold 11,693 shares of company stock for a total of $587,573.25, reducing his ownership by 3.88%. Following the transaction, Murry directly owns 290,050 shares. The company's stock traded down $0.09 to $48.40 on Wednesday, with a market cap of $3.30 billion and a P/E ratio of -15.03.

feed.title: Applied Optoelectronics (NASDAQ:AAOI) Insider Sells $876,319.39 in Stock
feed.summary: Applied Optoelectronics (NASDAQ:AAOI) Director David Kuo sold 17,467 shares of the company's stock on February 11th, 2026, for a total of $876,319.39. This transaction reduced his ownership by 13.53%. The stock traded down 0.2% to $48.40, and analysts have a consensus "Hold" rating with an average target price of $35.60.

feed.title: WELLTOWER INC. SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: Welltower Inc. has released its annual 10-K report, detailing a 41% increase in total revenues to $11,838 million, though net income and EPS saw slight decreases due to higher expenses and increased shares outstanding. The report highlights the company's focus on rental housing for seniors across the US, UK, and Canada, with strategic initiatives including significant acquisitions and dispositions to optimize its portfolio. Welltower also addresses operational, financial, and regulatory risks, alongside emerging challenges like AI integration and labor shortages, while committed to sustainability and human capital development.

feed.title: Globalfoundries (GFS) Hits New High on Swing to Profits
feed.summary: Globalfoundries (GFS) shares reached an over one-year high after the company reported a significant swing to profitability in 2025, achieving a net income of $888 million compared to a $262 million net loss in 2024. This financial improvement occurred despite only a 1% increase in net revenues. Additionally, Globalfoundries announced a plan to buy back $500 million worth of its common shares over the next 12 months to enhance shareholder value.

feed.title: Dollar General to detail full-year 2025 results in March 12 webcast
feed.summary: Dollar General Corporation (NYSE: DG) announced it will release its financial results for the fiscal 2025 fourth quarter and full year on March 12, 2026. CEO Todd Vasos and CFO Donny Lau will host a conference call at 8:00 a.m. CT/9:00 a.m. ET to discuss the earnings and potentially other business information. The call will be accessible via telephone and a live webcast, with a replay available until April 9, 2026.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Technology Companies: Cloudflare (NET), Datadog (DDOG) and Lyft (LYFT)
feed.summary: This article provides an overview of recent analyst ratings for three technology companies: Cloudflare (NET), Datadog (DDOG), and Lyft (LYFT). Cloudflare received a "Moderate Buy" consensus with a price target implying a 29.5% upside, Datadog received a "Strong Buy" with a 45.1% upside potential, and Lyft has a "Hold" consensus with a 38.4% upside from current levels. The report includes specific analyst recommendations and price targets from Bank of America Securities and UBS.

feed.title: Oppenheimer Asset Management Inc. Reduces Position in Huntington Ingalls Industries, Inc. $HII
feed.summary: Oppenheimer Asset Management Inc. significantly reduced its stake in Huntington Ingalls Industries (NYSE:HII) by 62.5% in Q3, selling 18,707 shares and retaining 11,242 shares valued at $3.237 million. Despite the reduction by one institutional investor, others like Geneos Wealth Management and IFP Advisors increased their holdings, and institutional investors collectively own 90.46% of the company's stock. Huntington Ingalls recently exceeded earnings expectations, with an EPS of $4.04 against an estimated $3.72, and declared a quarterly dividend of $1.38 per share.

feed.title: Oppenheimer Asset Management Inc. Has $4.03 Million Holdings in NRG Energy, Inc. $NRG
feed.summary: Oppenheimer Asset Management Inc. significantly increased its stake in NRG Energy, Inc. during the third quarter, now holding 24,896 shares valued at $4.03 million. This comes as NRG Energy authorized a $3.0 billion share buyback and raised its quarterly dividend. Despite some insider selling totaling over $30 million, institutional investors and hedge funds maintain a strong presence in the company.

feed.title: Oppenheimer & Co. Inc. Sells 24,110 Shares of Devon Energy Corporation $DVN
feed.summary: Oppenheimer & Co. Inc. reduced its stake in Devon Energy Corporation ($DVN) by 14.4%, selling 24,110 shares, but still holds 142,816 shares valued at over $5 million. Hedge funds and institutions collectively own about 69.72% of the company, which is expected to report Q4 earnings with a potential year-over-year EPS decline of 25.9%. Analyst sentiment is mixed, with some price target increases and decreases, though the average rating remains a "Moderate Buy."

feed.title: How Did Coca-Cola CEO James Quincey Deliver In Last Year?
feed.summary: Coca-Cola closed 2025 with modest revenue growth and steady volume trends, despite some one-time charges and currency headwinds, marking James Quincey's final results as CEO before stepping down. Henrique Braun is set to succeed him on March 31, inheriting a company focused on continued expansion and anticipating 4-5% organic revenue growth in 2026. The company successfully executed its strategy in a complex environment, achieving initial guidance and maintaining strong cash flow generation, including 63 consecutive years of dividend increases.

feed.title: JPMorgan downgrades Kraft Heinz, says it faces limited near-term upside after breakup pause
feed.summary: JPMorgan downgraded Kraft Heinz to an underweight rating from neutral, lowering its price target to $22 from $24, citing persistent challenges and limited near-term upside. The downgrade follows Kraft Heinz's announcement that it is pausing plans to split the company and instead will invest $600 million into its U.S. business, focusing on marketing, sales, and R&D. Analyst Thomas Palmer highlighted ongoing U.S. volume decline, market share losses, and the time required for new marketing investments to yield returns as key headwinds.

feed.title: Entergy: Q4 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Entergy Corp. (ETR) reported a fourth-quarter profit of $240.5 million, translating to 51 cents per share, which matched Wall Street expectations. The power company's revenue for the quarter was $2.96 billion, surpassing forecasts. For the full year, Entergy recorded a profit of $1.77 billion, or $3.91 per share, on revenue of $12.95 billion, and anticipates full-year earnings in the range of $4.25 to $4.45 per share.

feed.title: Regency Centers (NASDAQ:REG) Upgraded at Citigroup
feed.summary: Citigroup has upgraded Regency Centers (NASDAQ:REG) to a "Hold" rating. The company currently has a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts with an average price target of $78.79. Shares opened at $76.47, near their 52-week high, with a market capitalization of $13.99 billion.

feed.title: Pentair CFO team hits Citi and Barclays investor conferences in Miami
feed.summary: Pentair plc (NYSE: PNR) announced that its Executive Vice President and CFO, Bob Fishman (outgoing), and incoming CFO, Nick Brazis, along with EVP De’Mon Wiggins, will present at Citi’s 2026 Global Industrial Tech and Mobility Conference and Barclays Annual Industrial Select Conference in Miami. The presentations are scheduled for February 18th and 19th, 2026, respectively, and will be webcast live on Pentair's investor relations website, with replays available afterward. Pentair emphasizes its role as a leader in sustainable water solutions, reporting approximately $4.2 billion in revenue in 2025.

feed.title: BRAEMAR HOTELS & RESORTS (NYSE:BHR) Upgraded to Hold at Zacks Research
feed.summary: Zacks Research upgraded Braemar Hotels & Resorts (NYSE:BHR) from "strong sell" to "hold" on Tuesday, while Weiss Ratings reaffirmed a "sell (d+)," resulting in a MarketBeat consensus rating of "Reduce." The company, which is a publicly traded REIT focused on luxury hotels, trades at $3.04 with a negative P/E and high debt-to-equity. Institutional investors and hedge funds hold a significant portion of the stock, with some recently increasing their positions.

feed.title: CarMax Names Keith Barr as Chief Executive Officer
feed.summary: CarMax, Inc. announced the appointment of Keith Barr as President and Chief Executive Officer, effective March 16, 2026. Barr previously served as CEO of InterContinental Hotels Group and is expected to lead CarMax into its next phase of growth by focusing on customer experience, digital transformation, and brand loyalty. David McCreight will return to his role as an independent Director of the Board, and Tom Folliard will resume his duties as non-executive Chair after the June 2026 Annual Meeting.

feed.title: CarMax Names Keith Barr as Chief Executive Officer
feed.summary: CarMax, Inc. (NYSE: KMX) has announced the appointment of Keith Barr as its new President and Chief Executive Officer, effective March 16, 2026. Barr, a seasoned leader with extensive experience in driving growth and operational excellence in consumer-centric businesses, including a significant tenure at InterContinental Hotels Group, will also join the Board of Directors. David McCreight will return to his role as an independent Director, and Tom Folliard will continue as Interim Executive Chair until June 2026.

feed.title: Why AMG is boosting its stake in $12B liquid alternatives firm Garda
feed.summary: AMG announced an increased minority investment in Garda Capital Partners, a liquid alternatives manager specializing in fixed income relative value. This deepens a partnership that began in 2019, during which Garda's assets under management grew to over $12 billion. Garda will remain majority-owned by its management, and AMG will continue to account for the investment under the equity method, aligning with its long-term strategy of investing in specialized managers while preserving their independence.

feed.title: Texas Instruments (NASDAQ:TXN) Upgraded at DZ Bank
feed.summary: DZ Bank has upgraded Texas Instruments (NASDAQ:TXN) to a "strong sell" rating, a contrarian view amidst a consensus "Hold" rating and an average price target of $212.92. This comes despite TXN shares trading near a one-year high of $226.56 and other analysts raising their price targets. The company recently slightly missed quarterly earnings expectations but has positive long-term sentiment due to strong growth stock characteristics, macro tailwinds, and benefits from data-center demand, though it faces risks related to international sales.

feed.title: Webull Launches Consolidated Market Data Feed To Enhance Overnight U.S. Equity Trading Transparency
feed.summary: Webull (NASDAQ: BULL) has introduced a consolidated market data feed to improve transparency and liquidity visibility for global investors trading U.S. equities overnight. This new feed integrates real-time data from Blue Ocean and Bruce Markets into a single view within the Webull platform, addressing the fragmentation of overnight trading venues. The service offers both free top-of-book data and a paid Level 2 subscription, catering to active traders seeking detailed market insights.

feed.title: Brown & Brown taps $1.5B buyback plan with $250M deal
feed.summary: Brown & Brown, Inc. announced an accelerated share repurchase (ASR) program with Bank of America for $250 million of its common stock. This ASR is part of a larger $1.5 billion board-approved buyback authorization from October 2025. The company's stock activity and recent financial performance are provided as context, including strong 2025 revenues.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (VNT) Vontier Corporation Reports Q4 Revenue $808.5M, vs. FactSet Est of $764.7M
feed.summary: Vontier Corporation (VNT) reported strong Q4 revenue of $808.5 million, significantly surpassing the FactSet estimate of $764.7 million. The company also provided forward-looking guidance, expecting full-year 2026 adjusted EPS in the range of $3.35 to $3.50 and Q1 EPS between $0.78 and $0.81. These results indicate a positive financial performance for the industrial technology company.

feed.title: Brown & Brown, Inc. Announces Entry Into Accelerated Share Repurchase Program
feed.summary: Brown & Brown, Inc. has announced its entry into an Accelerated Share Repurchase Program. This news was reported by Refinitiv and concerns share buybacks involving US stocks. Further details are concise, indicating it's less than a minute read.
